---
title: "Articles"
description: "Retours d'expérience, explorations techniques et mise en production — data science, MLOps, LLM."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
